hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Production-baseline walk-forward backtest — the reference every H1-H7 comparison requires (also unblocks M2 attribution)

Signal-reconfirmed hold extension: at max_hold (390 bars), if the ticker would qualify as a FRESH entry right now (lgbm_pred_return > dynamic cost threshold AND dir_prob >= 0.60), extend the hold one more day instead of exiting — equivalent to a re-entry without paying the round-trip spread. Hard caps: max 2 extensions (3 days absolute), stops/trail/target always active, extension NEVER allowed if position is at a loss > 1x daily vol.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase holdext (4 variants: max_ext∈{1,2} × loss_gate_mult∈{1.0,2.0}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_status: MERGED — in production (v0.4.4). Backtest phase in PR #9 (DRAFT).
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Highest Railway backtest priority: owner-requested, strongest live evidence base (5W/4L max_hold cohort). Backtest phase PR #9 correctly held as DRAFT.
hypothesis_queue.blocked_note: test needs a backtest phase from draft PR #9/#10/#11 (unmerged) or a rewritten runnable command; flip to 'pending' with an exact CLI once the phase lands on main

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Stagnation exits are dead code in production (SIZING_STAGNATION_BARS == SIZING_MAX_HOLD_BARS = 390, so max_hold always fires first on flat trades). Re-enabling stagnation at 50/67/80% of max_hold frees capital from flat trades earlier. Bonus: PROD_PARAMS establishes the first production-comparable backtest baseline.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase stagnation (stag_bars ∈ {390 disabled=baseline, 195 50%, 260 67%, 312 80%}); acceptance = improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.pr_state: DRAFT — held pending Railway backtest; freeze intact. PROD_PARAMS is read-only reference constant — no behavior change until explicitly used.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: PROD_PARAMS baseline is the most intellectually honest addition this week — gives Railway worker a production-comparable floor. Stagnation exit is a reasonable optimization but unvalidated. Correctly held as DRAFT.

hypothesis_queue.hypothesis: Probe quality floor: during Kelly probation, require a minimum ensemble_signal >= 0.10 (and sentiment >= -0.50) for the daily probe entry. SNDK id=104 entered with ensemble=0.018 and sentiment=-0.90 — essentially pure noise. Historical ticker IC may be >= 0.05 over 30d but the current-bar signal can still be junk. A simple floor prevents noise-level probe entries while preserving the right to probe on genuine opportunity.
hypothesis_queue.test: python scripts/research_backtest.py --phase probe_floor (variants: min_signal ∈ {0.05, 0.10, 0.15} × min_sentiment ∈ {-0.50, 0.0}); acceptance = fewer noise entries, no reduction in Kelly IC recovery rate, improvement on BOTH tune AND hold-out legs
hypothesis_queue.added_by: Principal Skeptic / Integrity Sentinel review of SNDK probe id=104 (ensemble=0.018, sentiment=-0.90 — clear noise-level entry in probation mode). Separate from CODE RED integrity work; needs dedicated backtest on Railway.
hypothesis_queue.pm_priority_note: Low-risk guard. Does not change live strategy for non-probe paths. Safe to implement once Railway worker is enabled.
hypothesis_queue.blocked_note: needs_data_run on Railway; implement AFTER H0 baseline is established

completed_iterations.result: SHIPPED — corrected_metrics_summary() pure function added to Integrity Sentinel (CODE RED P1). Substitutes fill-price PnL for the 5 confirmed-corrupt rows and recomputes PF, win rate, net profit, and half-Kelly estimate. _audit_corrected_metrics() calls the function after each fill_price_pnl audit and writes reports/integrity/corrected_metrics.json. Principal Skeptic finding: corrected PF 1.587 vs stored 1.06, corrected net profit $1,533 vs stored $244. The scoreboard has been understating true performance. Kelly probation may be partially driven by inflated-loss data in the 10-day lookback window.
completed_iterations.tests_status: 39/39 tests pass in test_integrity_agent.py (24 pre-existing + 15 new). 105 pass full suite (10 pre-existing sandbox failures unchanged — numpy/pydantic deps absent in sandbox).
completed_iterations.notes: CODE RED P1: ledger truth quantification. Pure function, no DB writes. Integrity report now always includes corrected vs stored PF/net-profit/Kelly in every run. Integrity overall status remains 'warn' (5 corrupt rows unrepaired). Exit criteria progress: corrected_metrics check is now part of every Integrity Sentinel run, providing daily evidence of true performance.

completed_iterations.result: SHIPPED — fill_price_pnl_consistency check added to Integrity Sentinel (CODE RED P1). Closes blind spot where pnl=pnl_pct×entry×shares was internally consistent even when pnl itself was corrupted vs actual fill prices. Two pre-v0.4.5 rows confirmed: MU #93 (15.5% deviation) and SMCI #83 (24.8% deviation). New FILL_PNL_TOLERANCE=0.05 (5%) calibrated from live data (clean trades 0-3%, corrupted trades 15-25%). H9 proposed: probe quality floor (ensemble_signal >= 0.10 for probation probes).
completed_iterations.tests_status: 24/24 tests pass in test_integrity_agent.py; 105 pass full suite (18 pre-existing sandbox failures unchanged — torch/pydantic deps absent in sandbox)
completed_iterations.notes: CODE RED P1: ledger integrity. No strategy change. All new code is pure functions (no DB writes). Status 'warn' (not 'critical') because auto-repair would require all fill records which may not be available for historical trades.
